violations.issue: Manual token extraction in test.beforeAll() adds overhead - could use storageState for faster auth
violations.recommendation: Use storageState: 'playwright/.auth/admin.json' for API tests to eliminate login overhead

strengths: All tests use test.skip() in RED phase - no wasted execution during development
Network-first pattern with waitForResponse() eliminates hard waits - faster feedback
API tests run without browser overhead - very fast execution
E2E tests use storageState for auth - no repeated login overhead
No hardcoded timeouts or sleeps - tests proceed as fast as application allows
Tests can run in parallel with proper isolation (future optimization opportunity)
summary: Excellent performance characteristics. Network-first pattern and storageState auth eliminate major performance anti-patterns.
